title: Cobblemon Evolved
description: We’re thrilled to announce that Cobblemon Evolved is officially launching in Beta! 🎉 The server is open for you to start your adventure, catch your favorite Pokémon, and explore the Minecraft world we’ve been working on.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7cce2871bd25c306a0d31c80bb1c5afb27ebd6.webp)

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e150395313f59365dc1a3889925dc81bee507e.webp)

**🚨 Cobblemon Evolved Launch! 🚨**

Hey Trainers! 🌟

We’re thrilled to announce that Cobblemon Evolved is officially launching! 🎉 The server is open for you to start your adventure, catch your favorite Pokémon, and explore the Minecraft world we’ve been working on.

This is a early phase, so your feedback and suggestions are incredibly important to us! If you have ideas, spot bugs, or think of anything we can do to improve the server, please don’t hesitate to share them in ⁠💡✦suggestions. Let’s work together to make Cobblemon Evolved the best experience it can be!

Thank you for being part of this journey. Your support and dedication mean the world to us! 🖤 Let’s catch ‘em all and build something amazing together!

See you in the server! 🕹️✨
#HappyCatching #CobblemonEvolved

**Need a server to play with friends? Don't know how to setup one? Just rent already configured server!**

[![BH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bd4feeb38a3f19835ad6e0384431d6bd034cd96.webp)](https://shorturl.at/BWT28)

**Click on the picture above, select plan (Recommended 6GB or at least 4GB), use my code FishyHard to get 25% off your first month
and enjoy playing with your friends**
